untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise Fibonacci retracement levels (61.8%, 78.6%) and detection of climactic price extremes followed by intraday retracements. The allowed indicator set lacks: (1) Fibonacci retracement calculation tools, (2) intraday retracement detection logic, (3) climax/extreme identification beyond simple Donchian channels. Approximated using Donchian channels for breakouts and SMA50 as trend confirmation, but the core 61.8% retracement entry condition cannot be accurately translated.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for new extremes. Used sma_50 as trend confirmation per signal spec. Stop loss set to 1.0% as ATR multiple cannot be directly expressed in percentage terms without knowing exact volatility. Risk-reward ratio exit condition approximated via simple retracement beyond SMA50. The signal's precision depends on Fibonacci level calculations which are not in the allowed indicator set.
